experience.description: Developed backend using Spring Boot, MySQL (JPA/Hibernate). Designed RESTful APIs, implemented JWT authentication, premium features, and email notifications with Spring Mail. Generated vocabulary exports to PDF and Word; ensured code quality with JUnit and Mockito tests.

Built a platform connecting users to eco-friendly products using Node.js, Express, MS SQL Server. Developed REST APIs, implemented auth, and designed frontend with EJS + Bootstrap. Handled image uploads, deployed via XAMPP.

Built a full-stack E-commerce Website using React (Vite), Node.js/Express, MongoDB, and Redis in a Microservices Architecture. Containerized services with Docker, implemented horizontal scaling and load balancing using Nginx as a reverse proxy. Designed and implemented secure RESTful APIs for user authentication, product management, and shopping cart features.
